topic: ilhan omar net worth Google Trends
summary: Clear decay pattern from Jan 28 spike (100) to Feb 4 (8). Spike caused by attack at town hall. Baseline is 0-5. DOJ charges filed against attacker.
content: Daily data shows rapid decay: Jan 28=100, Jan 29=54, Jan 30=18, Jan 31=15, Feb 1=13, Feb 2=11, Feb 3=9, Feb 4=8. Pre-spike baseline over 12 months averages ~2, often at 0. The spike was triggered by the Jan 28 attack on Omar at a town hall meeting. DOJ has filed charges against the attacker. Omar remains politically prominent (Trump/ICE focus on Minnesota, running for reelection). By Feb 5, value likely ~5-7; by Feb 14, likely ~0-3 unless new event.
